name: Dumplings (Lc)
recipeIngredient: 4 cups chicken stock used for soup broth
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray the top of a double boiler with cooking spray.
2. Rub the pan with butter.
3. In a small bowl, combine eggs, cream, salt, and nutmeg. Beat together with a fork.
4. Pour the egg mixture into the top of the double boiler.
5. Cook over hot (but not boiling) water for 45 minutes or until firm and set.
6. Turn out onto waxed paper to cool.
7. In a separate pot, heat chicken stock.
8. Once the dumplings have cooled, slice them into cubes.
9. Add the cube of dumpling to clear, hot chicken stock.
10. Serve piping hot in individual soup bowls.
